_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in analyzing terminal or environment collection data.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in writing shell scripts to automate data operations, including file manipulation, job scheduling, environment configuration, log processing, and pipeline orchestration on Linux systems.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-S-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.563), DQ-S-006 (DQ, cosine: 0.554).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.4/10 (raw 0.343). Shared vocabulary: [data, environment, skill]. DCWF-only terms [analyzing, collection, terminal] vs WIDAI-only terms [automate, configuration, file, job, linux, log] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.881 (P=0.901, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.040 — the DCWF element's 8 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:0.0%, N:70.3%, C:29.7%). No dominant classification for "Skill in analyzing terminal or environment collection data." vs "Skill in writing shell scripts to automate data operations, including file manip" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.573 > STS 0.343 (gap +0.230). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, environment, skill] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.3%. Shared tokens: [data, environment, skill]. DCWF-only: [analyzing, collection, terminal]. WIDAI-only: [automate, configuration, file, job, linux, log].
